subcodes.title: The Fourth Principle—The Acceptance of the Relation between Religion and Science: Words spoken on 1911-11-12 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: Yesterday I spoke to you of the Second Principle of the Teaching of Baha'o'llah, the Unity of Mankind
subcodes.first_line_orig: دیروز بیان کردیم اساس ثانی وحدت عالم انسانی است سوم دین و علم توام است اگر
subcodes.subjects: @harmony of science and religion, @empty learning; false spirituality, @independent investigation of truth; reality, @progressive revelation; renewal of religion, @changing and unchanging parts of religion, @unity in diversity, @idolatry, @religion as reality; definitions of religion, @differences in human capacity
